title: Evolve
body_text:
Verification
Launch python main.py --debug
Tools menu → "The Recall" creates an empty SessionNode with placeholder text
Drag a .json session file from Explorer onto the canvas → SessionNode auto-created with summary
Drag a second .json onto an existing SessionNode → new SessionNode spawns nearby
Click the import sticker button → nodes from the session appear near the SessionNode, all selected
Connections from the session file are wired between imported nodes
Imported nodes have fresh UUIDs (no collision with existing canvas nodes)
Save + reload session → SessionNode persists with its source_path and summary
